description: Standardized control capabilities for a connected FERAL Robot Node SDK actuator.

endpoints.description: Moves the robotic chassis or arm in a specified mapping direction.

params.name: direction
params.description: The cardinal or relative direction to move (e.g. forward, left, up).

params.name: speed
params.description: The speed percentage from 0 to 100. >50 triggers safety rails.

endpoints.description: Actuates the robotic end-effector to open or close.

params.name: action
params.description: Whether to open or close the gripper.
